stepTexts.0: Today you'll learn to beg. You'll repeat exactly what I tell you.
stepTexts.7: Repeat after me: "I love making you feel good".
stepTexts.14: Say: "please, let me make you feel good". Say it loud.
stepTexts.34: Good. From now on, you can beg on your own when you want more. The button just appeared on screen.
